The '''TC-17''' was a [[Sniper rifle/Legends|long-range]] [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] equipped with a [[Scope/Legends|scope]] and designed for use by [[Sniper/Legends|snipers]]. The [[Rifle/Legends|rifle]] had a range of over three-hundred [[Meter/Legends|meters]]. Each [[Power cell/Legends|power cell]] held enough energy for a dozen shots before it needed to be replaced.<ref name="POD" />

During the [[New Sith Wars]], at least one [[unit]] within the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]]' [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Army/Legends|army]] used TC-17 rifles. In [[1002 BBY]], the [[unit]] known as the [[Gloom Walkers]] was assigned four TC-17s, one for each [[Squad/Legends|squad]] within the unit participating in the [[Battle of Phaseera]]. [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Darth Bane/Legends|Dessel]], a former [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]] [[Miner/Legends|miner]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Apatros/Legends|Apatros]], used one of the rifles, which he took from fellow Gloom Walker [[Lucia (soldier)|Lucia]], to [[Death/Legends|kill]] several [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] during the battle.<ref name="POD" />

==Behind the scenes==
The TC-17 [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] rifle was featured in the novel ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'', written by [[Drew Karpyshyn]] and released on [[September 26]], [[2006]].
